title: Acid Wasteland
description: A wasteland theme datapack with acid rain, mutated mobs and many other features.
body:
![In-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d2RUHnPy/images/cbfb757bc049e21b308a30df29e598e04b2a037e.jpeg)
## Get ready for the ultimate acid rain apocalypse survival challenge!
<hr />
Gameplay footage:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ezFYYkptdeE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### This game-changing datapack will bring you a whole new post-apocalyptic survival experience:

1. A desolate, decaying world filled with unique wasteland structures

2. Mutated and powerful monsters waiting to test your strength

3. A terrifying acid rain system that constantly threatens your survival

4. Strange new foods with mysterious and unpredictable effects

A completely reimagined survival mode that will push you to your limits!


You can play directly by loading the mod.
If you are using datapack. Don’t forget to put the resource pack in the resourcepacks folder to see custom textures!

## 準備迎接酸雨末日的生存挑戰吧！
<hr />

### 這款徹底改變遊戲玩法的資料包，將帶給你前所未有的末日生存體驗：

1. 荒涼頹廢的世界與獨特廢土建築

2. 變異的強大怪物等待你挑戰

3. 令人畏懼的酸雨系統，時時刻刻威脅你的生存

4. 稀奇古怪的食物與未知的神秘效果

全面顛覆的生存模式，挑戰你的極限！

用模組載入可以直接遊玩。
如果你是使用資料包。別忘了把資源包放進 resourcepacks 資料夾，才能看到自訂材質！
